text:
(a) Farm-to-Market Road 1479 in Cameron County is designated as the Bobby Morrow Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Bobby Morrow Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.190 (Sergeant Andrew James Creighton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(42), eff. September 1, 2023.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.205 — Bobby Morrow Memorial Highway

(a) Farm-to-Market Road 1479 in Cameron County is designated as the Bobby Morrow Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Bobby Morrow Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.190 (Sergeant Andrew James Creighton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(42), eff. September 1, 2023.

*Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 301 (S.B.787), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2021.*

erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.
Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.190 (Sergeant Andrew James Creighton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(42), eff. September 1, 2023.
